Comfortable Accommodation: Old House in Ushguli offers a guest house experience with free WiFi and free on-site private parking. The property is pet-friendly, welcoming guests with their furry companions.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy mountain views, a shared bathroom with a shower, and a comfortable environment. The reception staff speak English, Georgian, and Russian, ensuring smooth communication.
Local Attractions: Located 40 km from the Museum of History and Ethnography and 43 km from the Mikhail Khergiani House Museum, Old House provides easy access to local points of interest. Kutaisi International Airport is 167 km away.
Guest Favorites: Visitors highly rate Old House for its family-friendly atmosphere, delicious breakfast provided by the property, and dinner options.

Comfortable Accommodation: Mountain Cabin in Ushguli offers a lodge with a garden, terrace, and free WiFi in public areas. Each room features air-conditioning, a balcony, and a private bathroom with free toiletries.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy a washing machine, fireplace, and parquet floors. Additional amenities include a sofa bed, refrigerator, electric kettle, and TV.
